overview: Premium futuristic personal brand + product system for Prince Sharma / AVT3B. Features 9 full-viewport sections with smooth navigation, a dynamic product store powered by backend storage, and a hidden admin panel for managing products.
features: 9 full-screen sections with smooth keyboard/button navigation
Dynamic product cards with image, price, and buy button
Hidden admin panel (A×3 trigger) with product CRUD
Premium black + neon green design with glow effects
Mobile-responsive with swipe on product section
